news.t: BlackRock Launches First-of-its-Kind ETF Offering Access to the Full US Bond Market

overview.description: The iShares Total USD Fixed Income Market ETF (BTOT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund tracks an index that provides comprehensive exposure to USD-denominated fixed income securities of various maturities and credit quality. BTOT was launched on Dec 10, 2025 and is issued by BlackRock.
infoTable: Bloomberg U.S. Total Fixed Income Market Index

data.title: BlackRock Launches First-of-its-Kind ETF Offering Access to the Full US Bond Market
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Today, BlackRock announced the launch of the iShares Total USD Fixed Income Market ETF (NYSE: BTOT), the industry's first index ETF that seeks to provide investors with comp...
